story.title: Neon Requiem
story.logline: When a powerful tech mogul's daughter is kidnapped, a hard-boiled cyberpunk detective must navigate the dark underbelly of the city to rescue her and uncover the truth behind the sinister forces driving the crime.

acts.label: Introduction
acts.description: We meet our protagonist, JACKSON, a grizzled cyberpunk detective with a troubled past, as he takes on a new case from the wealthy and influential TEODORA, whose daughter has been kidnapped.

acts.label: Rising Action
acts.description: As Jackson delves deeper into the case, he uncovers a web of corruption and deceit that leads him to a powerful tech mogul with a hidden agenda.

acts.label: Climax
acts.description: Jackson faces off against the tech mogul's henchmen in a tense showdown to rescue Teodora's daughter and prevent a catastrophic event that could destroy the city.

acts.label: Resolution
acts.description: The dust settles, and Jackson must come to terms with the consequences of his actions and the true nature of the forces he has been battling.

story.world: In the neon-lit underbelly of Neo-Tokyo, corruption and greed have created a city on the brink of collapse, where the divide between the haves and the have-nots has grown insurmountable.
